MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Katherine Y. Wang, Esq. of HAROWITZ & TIGERMAN (415-788-1588) for plaintiff / opposing party Evea Merle Reynolds

RULING:
Defendant Foster Wheeler, LLC's motion for summary judgment. No other appearances and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Foster Wheeler's motion is denied and its alternate motion for summary adjudication is granted. Liberally construed, the declaration of Mr. Lineaweaver and the deposition of Mr. McDown at 16:26-18:3 create a triable issue as to Mr. Williamson's exposure to an asbestos-containing product attributable to defendant. Plaintiff's withdrawal of her punitive damages claim requires granting of the alternate motion for summary adjudication. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(220/HEK)
